column1: In the 19th century, there was a famous detective agency called ‘Noah’s Ark.’
People knew nothing about who the owner was or what purpose it was founded for.
But they were well aware that the agency could solve anything.
However, as time passed and technology advanced, people began looking for AI that was more capable than ‘Noah’s Ark.’
People no longer needed detectives, but ‘Noah’s Ark’ still exists to this day.
You have now become a new detective here.
